Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Emeril hosts a group of "recipe rut" moms.
Video.title: Vinaigrettes Aren't Just for Salads

Video.summary: Emeril shares some of his favorite mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Join Emeril for a Mexican birthday fiesta!
Video.title: Real Mexican

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces. Plus, Emeril's classic Moules mariniere with pommes frites
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: Emeril shows a group of bachelors how to impress with a classic and affordable French dinner: sauteed chicken cutlets with Dijon-tarragon sauce, braised carrots, and pommes Lyonnaise
Video.title: Frugal French

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello helps create New England eats.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos take inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: For your next get together, make Louisiana bourbon the star ingredient.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: For your next get together, try Emeril's favorite beef recipes with an international twist!
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: Inspired by saffron grown right here in the states, Emeril serves up his famous lobster with pappardelle and saffron cream sauce, seafood paella, and saffron olive oil cake.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: For your next get together, celebrate the creole tomato with some of Emeril's favorite dishes.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.summary: For your next tailgate, let Los Angeles' Asian flavors inspire you.
Video.title: Los Angeles Chargers

Video.summary: At the next home game, turn classic dinner dishes into a fancy tailgate meal.
Video.title: Jacksonville Jaguars

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts

Video.summary: Inspired by Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite pecan recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Emeril and Lindsey Brower and Nan Wallis create a meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Honoring Wisconsin, the cheese capital of the US, by making cheesy beer dips and soft pretzels.
Video.title: Green Bay

Video.summary: Grilling contest winner recipes: Laotian Grilled Pork Skewers with Papaya Salad and Sticky Rice; Grilled Eggplant Pockets; Ginger-Mango Flank Steak with Fennel Slaw; Mike's Mega Grilled Pizza
Video.title: Emeril's Grilling Contest

Video.summary: Shrimp Wontons, Bok Choy and Asparagus Stir Fry, Steamed Egg Custard with Pork, Lemon Chicken, Orange Mango Pudding
Video.title: A Taste of Hong Kong

Video.summary: Penne ŕ la Puttanesca; Veal Saltimbocca; Lemon and Rosemary-Marinated Grilled Chicken Breasts with Couscous and Balsamic Cremini Mushrooms; Stir-Fried Beef with Broccoli and Rice; Angel Food Cake
Video.title: Express Lane

Video.summary: Country Ham with Red-Eyed Gravy, Beignets and Cafe au Lait, Chicory Creme Brulee Mocha Cheesecake
Video.title: Coffee Talk

Video.summary: Asian-Marinated Cocktail Drummettes; Pecan Crusted Duck Confit Salad; Sauteed Frog Legs with Tomato-Garlic Butter; Smoked Turkey Leg and Sausage Jambalaya; Roasted Leg of Lamb and Sauce Perigueux
Video.title: Luscious Legs

Video.summary: Sicilian Eggplant Relish, Pasta con le Sarde, Cassata Siciliana
Video.title: A Taste of Sicily

Video.summary: Emeril and Justin Kennedy prepare a menu with classic New Orleans sandwiches.
Video.title: with Justin Kennedy

Video.summary: Scrambled Ham and Egg Breakfast Sandwiches on Biscuits; Kicked-Up Shrimp Caesar Salad Piadine; Turkey Sandwiches with Pesto Mayonnaise and Dried Cranberries
Video.title: Super-Duper Sandwiches

Video.summary: Tea Eggs, Tea Leaf Shrimp, Tea-Scented Sponge Cake with Honey Glaze
Video.title: Cooking with Tea

Video.summary: Fried Parmesan Eggplant Sticks with Garlic and Cilantro, New Orleans Eggplant Boat with Shrimp Etouffee, Grilled Eggplant and Lamb Medallion Sandwich with Rosemary Aioli
Video.title: Eggplant

Video.summary: Crispy Seared Snapper with Parsnip Slaw and Herb Jus, Annie's Peasant-Style Escolar
Video.title: New New Orleans Fish

Video.summary: Pound Cake with Dried Fruit and Port Wine Reduction Sauce, Strawberries with Champagne Sabayon, Plums and Madeira over Ice Cream with Almond Cookies
Video.title: Desserts with Wine

Video.summary: Tennessee Titans (and Southern home cooking) superfans Isaiah Washington and Jameson Greer.
Video.title: Nashville

Video.summary: Turning Kansas City's world famous barbecue into tender ribs and bourbon-baked beans for the grill.
Video.title: Kansas City
